overview: A professional industrial monitoring dashboard for JSS Automotives — track real-time machine health, sensor data, production counts, and predictive maintenance across your factory floor. Dark-mode UI with live alerts, wear progression charts, and CSV export.
features: Real-time machine health monitoring with sensor simulation
Custom alert thresholds with color-coded severity levels
Wear progression computation and predictive maintenance scoring
Production tracking with trend charts and hourly breakdowns
Live alerts panel with filtering, search, and CSV export
Professional industrial dark-mode UI with responsive layout
